steps.title: Identify the greatest common factor
steps.content:
In the expression $5x + 15$, both terms contain the factor 5:
  • $5x = 5 \cdot x$
  • $15 = 5 \cdot 3$
The greatest common factor is 5.

steps.title: Factor out the GCF and match to the choice
steps.content: Factor out 5 from both terms: $$5x + 15 = 5(x + 3)$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
